# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Customizable Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run before build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Build commands to execute (one per line)'
        required: true
        type: string
        default: 'echo "No build commands specified"'
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for executing commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python
        default: 'bash'
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for build commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      environment_variables:
        description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (leave empty to skip setup)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (leave empty to skip setup)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (leave empty to skip setup)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      go_version:
        description: 'Go version (leave empty to skip setup)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      upload_artifacts:
        description: 'Upload build artifacts'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build/'
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for uploaded artifacts'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build-artifacts'
      enable_caching:
        description: 'Enable dependency caching'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      cache_paths:
        description: 'Paths to cache (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      cache_key:
        description: 'Cache key (uses hash of inputs if empty)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Job timeout in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 60
      runs_on:
        description: 'Runner to use'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - ubuntu-22.04
          - ubuntu-20.04
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
          - macos-13
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'

jobs:
  custom_build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runs_on }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup Go
        if: inputs.go_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ inputs.go_version }}

      - name: Parse environment variables
        if: inputs.environment_variables != ''
        id: parse_env
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "${{ inputs.environment_variables }}" > env_vars.txt
          while IFS= read -r line; do
            if [ -n "$line" ]; then
              echo "$line" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            fi
          done < env_vars.txt
          rm env_vars.txt

      - name: Restore cache
        if: inputs.enable_caching == true && inputs.cache_paths != ''
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ${{ inputs.cache_paths }}
          key: ${{ inputs.cache_key != '' && inputs.cache_key || format('cache-{0}-{1}', runner.os, hashFiles(inputs.cache_paths)) }}
          restore-keys: |
            cache-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Run pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}

      - name: Run build commands
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}

      - name: Run post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: inputs.upload_artifacts == true
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Build summary
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Runner**: ${{ inputs.runs_on }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Shell**: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Working Directory**: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Status**: ${{ job.status }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          if [ "${{ inputs.node_version }}" != "" ]; then
            echo "- **Node.js Version**: ${{ inputs.node_version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
          if [ "${{ inputs.python_version }}" != "" ]; then
            echo "- **Python Version**: ${{ inputs.python_version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
          if [ "${{ inputs.java_version }}" != "" ]; then
            echo "- **Java Version**: ${{ inputs.java_version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
          if [ "${{ inputs.go_version }}" != "" ]; then
            echo "- **Go Version**: ${{ inputs.go_version }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
          if [ "${{ inputs.upload_artifacts }}" == "true" ]; then
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "### Artifacts" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "- **Name**: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "- **Path**: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
